race.description: Tab Venue Mode Country Boosted Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: ZEEMA (8) had been threatening another win before finding one much too good when heavily bet over 1200m at Moruya. The speedy mare comes home will appreciate switching back to 1000m. Has an inside gate, and the blinkers are applied for the first time. McLucas rides, and she is flying. PUSHALOT (2) resumes and is up to this. She's sharp fresh and has placed 2/2 this course and distance. Owen is reunited, and a bold run is likely. CURLY BEND (6) returned from a break with a 1.5 lengths defeat over 1010m at Moruya. This looks a touch easier, and she's proven second-up. Should be in the money with the extra fitness. SHE'S THE KEY (7) is likely to show more fourth-up. She's a leader drawn the rails gate and has won her best races this track/trip. JVO is a positive jockey booking, and without surprise, she can turn things around
